decisions.briefing: Markets are in solid risk-on mode today with NASDAQ up 0.9% and S&P 500 up 0.6%, which favors our momentum-heavy book. Unfortunately, with only $67.94 cash remaining we have no meaningful buying power to fill the 3 open slots — forcing a sell-to-rotate without current prices on existing holdings carries unnecessary risk. All 7 positions are held; INFQ remains in the screener at score 90 and is tracking near cost basis, worth monitoring for rotation next session if a stronger candidate emerges.

market_education.summary_en: Equities extended their recent recovery on May 28 with tech leading gains, as investor sentiment improved on signs of easing trade tensions and resilient consumer spending data. The NASDAQ outpaced the broader S&P 500, reflecting continued appetite for growth and AI-linked names. Risk assets broadly benefited as bond yields held steady, removing a key headwind for high-multiple stocks.
market_education.summary_zh: 5月28日美股延續近期漲勢，科技股領漲大市。市場情緒改善，主因貿易緊張局勢出現緩和跡象，加上消費支出數據顯示韌性。納斯達克指數升幅優於標普500，反映投資者對成長股及AI概念股的持續熱情。債券殖利率維持平穩，減少了高估值股票的壓力，風險資產全線受惠。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to the uninvested cash a portfolio holds, kept ready to deploy into new opportunities. Today's situation illustrates why maintaining some cash reserve matters: even with 3 open position slots and strong buy candidates (SOC scoring 100), we cannot act because cash is nearly depleted at $67.94. Balancing full investment with a small cash buffer ensures you can capitalize on high-conviction setups without being forced to sell at potentially bad prices.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」指投資組合中保留的未投資現金，隨時等待部署於新機會。今日情況正好說明保留適量現金儲備的重要性：即使有3個空缺倉位，且市場出現評分高達100的強力買入候選股（SOC），我們卻因現金僅剩67.94美元而無法行動。在充分投資與保留小額現金緩衝之間取得平衡，可確保在高信念機會出現時能迅速出手，而無需被迫在不理想的價位賣出現有持股。
